title: lithocarpus coalitus
intro: Lithocarpus coalitus, also known as the Chinese Bur Oak, is a plant species native to China, characterized by its evergreen leaves and small, acorn-like fruits. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal effects. The health benefits of Lithocarpus coalitus include reducing fever, relieving cough and bronchitis, and treating various skin conditions due to its antiseptic and antihistamine properties. Lithocarpus coalitus is typically prepared for medicinal use in the form of decoctions, infusions, or ointments, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
